title: Nio Limited (NIO) Q1 2023 Earnings: What to Expect
text: NIO delivered 31,041 vehicles in Q1 2023, ranking first in premium battery electric vehicle market priced over RMB400,000 in China for 12 consecutive quarters. Deliveries in April 2023 reached 6,658 vehicles and in May 2023 reached 6,155 vehicles. Cash and cash equivalents, restricted cash, short-term investment and long-term time deposits totaled RMB 37.8 billion (US$5.5 billion) as of March 31, 2023. For Q2 2023, NIO expected deliveries between 23,000-25,000 vehicles, representing 8.2%-0.2% decrease from Q2 2022, with total revenues expected between RMB 8,742-9,370 million (US$1,273-1,364 million), down 15.1%-9.0% from Q2 2022. On May 24, 2023, NIO launched All-New ES6, a smart electric all-round SUV, with deliveries starting the next day.
